title: Chopper Uses the Rumble Ball
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on chopper uses the rumble ball, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper Uses the Rumble Ball. Chopper fights Chessmarimo with the power of the Rumble Ball while the struggle for Drum Castle intensifies. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: My rumble ball lasts for 3 minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And I'll beat you within that time!

dialogue.speaker: Chessmarimo
dialogue.text: 3 minutes!? Muhahaha! You won't be able to beat me, much less within only 3 minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: 3 minutes!? I'd love to see that!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: 3 minutes!? Ha, I'd love to see that!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hee hee hee... looks like we've got quite a show today.
